untranslatable_reason: Signal requires comparison of shadow heights to 'breakout price' and 'median values' from an unstated lookup table. The specific median thresholds and breakout price calculation methodology are not provided in source text. Signal also references 'tall shadows have a percentage higher than the median' but exact percentage thresholds are marked AUTHOR_SILENT. Cannot establish deterministic rules without these calibration parameters.
translation_notes: Approximated doji detection using body_pct < 5% and equal/tall shadow analysis using upper_wick vs lower_wick comparison. Above-average volume condition translated to volume > hvol_20. Context-dependent direction preserved. Exit conditions use reversal logic as author provided no exit specification.
